annotations.title: Many masters.
annotations.text: <mn>◦</mn> He meaneth principally Sect-masters that make themselves several Ringleaders in sundry sorts of new devised doctrines: every one arrogating to himself to be master, and none so humble as to be a scholer, either to God's Church and true Pastors, or to other guides and authors of the said sects. So did Zuinglius disdain to be Luther's scholar, and Calvin to be the follower of Zuinglius.

notes.text: Many masters are many proud Sect-masters.
